title: Genesis extract epistemically honest daughter identity (L-1601 full fix)
hypothesis: genesis_extract.py can produce daughters with honest epistemic identity: no false parent evidence claims, lineage markers, birth identity, session reset
method: All daughter lessons get evidence annotation (Measured->Inherited (parent Measured))
PHILOSOPHY.md: table cells, ground truth lines, session counts all annotated
IDENTITY.md: auto-generated name, birth_session=S0, lineage, purpose
CORE.md: genesis_lineage section with parent_hash, generation, birth_session
Session lines in lessons marked (parent session, inherited)
Tested with --ultra-lean bundle, verified orient.py works

results.lessons_without_annotation_reason: Confidence types (Assumed, Designed, Theorized, verified) that don't claim observation - correctly left as-is

effect_size: 6/6 L-1601 identity debts resolved: false evidence claims (0 remaining), lineage markers (genesis_lineage in CORE.md), birth identity (IDENTITY.md with auto-name), session counter reset (S0), PHILOSOPHY.md annotated (29 ground truths + 23 active statuses + 29 evidence types)
falsification_criteria: Daughter with these fixes still cannot establish independent identity within 5 sessions (from L-1601)
